blocking.title: Blocking
blocking.selectProtectionDaysDesc: Choose how many days you want uninstall protection to be active
blocking.infoBlockAdultContent:
When enabled, you won't be able to access adult content on Supported Browsers and popular social media apps. (also this feature will automatically filter out adult content from search results in Supported Browsers)

Supported browsers:
Chrome, Firefox, Brave, Opera, Opera Mini, Microsoft Edge, Samsung Internet, DuckDuckGo, Vivaldi, UC Browser, and Kiwi Browser.
blocking.infoBlockImageVideoSearch: When enabled, image and video search results will be blocked on supported browsers to prevent exposure to inappropriate visual content.
blocking.infoBlockFacebookReels: When enabled, the Facebook Reels section will be blocked to help you avoid distracting short-form video content.
blocking.infoBlockYoutubeShorts: When enabled, YouTube Shorts will be blocked to help you stay focused and avoid endless scrolling through short videos.
blocking.infoBlockWhatsappChannels: When enabled, WhatsApp Channels will be blocked to prevent access to potentially inappropriate content shared through public channels.
blocking.infoBlockTelegramSearch: When enabled, Telegram's search functionality will be blocked to prevent searching for inappropriate content or channels.
blocking.infoUninstallProtection:
When enabled, this prevents uninstalling this app and changing its related settings unless approved by your Accountability Partner.

Note: No technology is 100% perfect, uninstall protection is just one tool to support you in managing compulsive usage. This requires Device Admin app permission.
blocking.infoBlockUnsupportedBrowsers: When enabled, browsers that are not supported by Hur's content blocking will be automatically blocked to prevent bypassing the protection.
blocking.infoBlockNewlyInstalledApps: When enabled, any newly installed app will be automatically blocked until you manually allow it from the blocklist.
blocking.infoBlockedScreenMessage: Set a custom message that will be displayed on the blocking screen when an app or website is blocked. This can be a motivational quote or a personal reminder.
blocking.infoBlockedScreenCountdown: Set how long the countdown timer lasts before the close button becomes active on the blocking screen. A longer countdown gives you more time to reconsider.
blocking.infoRedirectUrl: Set a custom URL to redirect to after closing the blocking screen. By default, you are redirected to Google. You can set it to any website you find helpful.

blocklist.title: Blocklist
blocklist.tapToAddKeywords: Tap + to add keywords or websites
blocklist.confirmBlockMessage: This app will be blocked and you won't be able to open it. Your accountability partner will be notified of any changes.
blocklist.keywordNote: Blocked keywords/websites only works on supported browsers and popular social media apps.

partner.title: Accountability Partner
partner.description: Add a partner to increase your commitment
partner.selfDescription: Time delay before settings can be changed
partner.partnerDescription: Partner approval required to change settings

onboarding.privacyTitle: How do we protect your data?
onboarding.privacySubtitle: Protecting your privacy is our top priority. We're committed to ensuring you have full confidence in how we handle your personal information.
onboarding.privacyPoint1: To enable features like blocking unwanted websites/apps, uninstall protection, and enhancing productivity, we require Accessibility service permission.
onboarding.privacyPoint2: Rest assured, we do not collect or transmit any data from your phone via the Accessibility service.
onboarding.privacyPoint3: Your personal data remains confidential and is not shared with third parties without your explicit consent.
onboarding.privacyAgree: By continuing, you agree to our
onboarding.termsAndPrivacy: Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
onboarding.accessibilityPoint1: Hur leverages accessibility features to block adult content and other unwanted websites/apps on your device. It also allows you to customize your blocklist with specific sites and apps you choose to block.
onboarding.accessibilityPoint2: Rest assured, Hur maintains your privacy: no data from your phone is collected or transmitted. All your information stays securely on your device.
onboarding.accessibilityCheckbox: By checking this box, I agree to allow Hur to use the Accessibility service for effective functioning.
onboarding.permissionsDescription: We need some permissions to protect you
onboarding.accessibilityServiceDescription: To monitor open apps and browsers and block adult content
onboarding.webBlockingDescription: Adult websites are automatically blocked by monitoring browser URLs — no VPN needed
